description: Seed fixtures for the v5 falsification gate pipeline. The first 5 entries (cluster_ids 5122, 6649, 19814, 26972, 31610) are the original spec-derived fixtures from the failure-analysis document — clusters 5122, 6649, 19814 are archived in the current DB and the harness reports them as insufficient_data. The remaining entries are tagged in their notes as `[source: regression_baseline_2026-05-07]` and were appended on 2026-05-07 by sampling the latest NVI snapshots for active clusters that exhibit each gate type. Their expected_gates and expected_nvi_max values reflect the system's current behaviour, not human-labeled ground truth — they exist to detect regressions in gate logic, not to certify correctness.

fixtures.notes: 11 UK regional outlets publishing the same wire-service drug-bust story. v4.1 alerted at NVI 72.2 with disagreement=0.0. v5 wire_service gate must fire either via known-syndicators (UK regional domain list) or hash-diversity branch.

5 government articles spanning Spain, Slovakia, Eritrea, Poland, Moldova. Topic ('government') cluster, not narrative. v4.1 alerted at NVI 99 / disagreement=0.0. v5: small sample triggers insufficient_evidence + dna_match; near-zero entity overlap triggers entity_concentration.

5 unrelated articles (hip-hop history, Armenian news, Irish politics). v4.1 alerted at NVI 100 with perfect ensemble agreement. v5: every small-cluster gate (insufficient_evidence, dna_match, ensemble_uncertainty) plus entity_concentration must fire.
4-post cluster correctly rejected in v4.1 via the insufficient-evidence early-return path. v5: must continue to reject — gate 2 caps at 40, gate 3 (dna_match) caps at 35 if no DNA matches.

64 posts from 57 distinct sources about 'Tax Ethnicity', all published within one hour. Unique content hashes (rewritten) but 85%+ embedding similarity. v4.1 alerted at NVI 71.7. v5 wire_service gate must fire via the hash-diversity branch (unique_hash_ratio > 0.90 AND embedding_similarity_mean > 0.80 AND source_diversity > 0.65 AND dna_match_count == 0).

[source: regression_baseline_2026-05-07] wire_service firing; dna_match (no strong DNA evidence); routine news cycle. Snapshot NVI=25.0; expected_gates and nvi cap captured from the latest nvi_snapshot, not from independent re-review.
